# The Well - Lakeland, FL
> Your Business & Culture Connection

## About
The Well is a coworking community space and event venue located in downtown Lakeland, Florida. We provide premium workspace, meeting rooms, and event hosting for professionals, creatives, and community organizations.

## Location
- Address: 114 E. Parker St., Lakeland, FL 33801
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/x91ydex5iquogYNX8

## Contact
- Phone: (863) 668-1541
- Phone: (863) 513-0416
- Email: thewell.lakeland@gmail.com

## Hours
- Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
- Saturday & Sunday: Available Upon Appointment

## Services
- Coworking Space: Flexible hot desks and dedicated desks for individuals and teams
- Meeting Rooms: Professional meeting and conference rooms available for hourly or daily booking
- Event Venue: Versatile event space for workshops, networking events, private parties, and community gatherings
- Community Hub: A welcoming space that connects business professionals and cultural creatives

## Event Booking
- Event Request Form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSe8t-mnZMqvqOj5Sj1ggCIs7Vyeaf-WcFQil0XTjunW4ZBAUQ/viewform

## Social Media
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/thewell.lakeland
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thewell.lakeland/

## Website
- URL: https://thewell-lakeland.com

## FAQs

### What is The Well?
The Well is a coworking community space and event venue in downtown Lakeland, FL. We offer flexible workspace solutions, meeting rooms, and event hosting services.

### Where is The Well located?
We are located at 114 E. Parker St., Lakeland, FL 33801, in the heart of downtown Lakeland.

### What are your hours of operation?
We are open Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM. Weekend availability is by appointment only.

### How do I book an event?
You can submit an event request through our online form at https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSe8t-mnZMqvqOj5Sj1ggCIs7Vyeaf-WcFQil0XTjunW4ZBAUQ/viewform or contact us directly by phone or email.

### Do you offer day passes for coworking?
Please contact us directly at (863) 668-1541 or thewell.lakeland@gmail.com for information about day passes and membership options.

### Is parking available?
Downtown Lakeland offers street parking and nearby parking lots. Contact us for specific directions and parking recommendations.
